zh.lifeSummary: 當Elisabeth von Sulzbach於1140年出生在德國貝也素爾茲巴賀時，她的父親Gebhard III. von Sulzbach35歲，母親Mathilde von Bayern32歲。她於大約1159年與Graf Rapoto von Ortenburg結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1205年1月23日在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 特勞恩斯坦阿爾騰馬可特 安 德 阿爾茲包包格享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elisabeth von Sulzbach于1140年出生在德国貝也素爾茲巴賀时，她的父亲Gebhard III. von Sulzbach35岁，母亲Mathilde von Bayern32岁。她于大约1159年与Graf Rapoto von Ortenburg结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1205年1月23日在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 特勞恩斯坦阿爾騰馬可特 安 德 阿爾茲包包格享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Sulzbach
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Horst.
German and Jewish (western Ashkenazic): habitational name from any of the many places called Sulzbach.

nameMeanings.name: Elisabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Elisabeth von Sulzbach was born in 1140, in Sulzbach, Bavaria, Germany, her father, Gebhard III. von Sulzbach, was 35 and her mother, Mathilde von Bayern, was 32. She married Graf Rapoto von Ortenburg about 1159. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 23 January 1205, in Baumburg, Altenmarkt an der Alz, Traunstein, Bavaria, Germany, at the age of 65.

Elle a épousé Graf Rapoto von Ortenburg environ 1159. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 23 janvier 1205, à Baumburg, Altenmarkt an der Alz, Landkreis Traunstein, Bayern, Allemagne, à l’âge de 65 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Elisabeth von Sulzbach(이)가 1140년 독일 베이른 설즈바치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gebhard III. von Sulzbach(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mathilde von Bayern(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 대략 1159년 Graf Rapoto von Ortenburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1205년 1월 23일 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 트라스타인 알텐마k트 앤 데르 알즈 바버그에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elisabeth von Sulzbach родилась в 1140 г. в местности сулзбач, беиирн, Германия, её отцу по имени Gebhard III. von Sulzbach было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde von Bayern, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Graf Rapoto von Ortenburg около 1159 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 23 января 1205 г. в местности баумбург, алтенмаркт ан дир алз, ландкрис траунстин, беиирн, Германия в возрасте 65 лет.
